rules.description: Khaleeji register calibration for Arabic sessions, fires after L0 establishes generation contract. Trimmed from v1.1: English-generation directive moved to L0 extension (composer.py) to avoid contradicting EN-first architecture.

action.content: KHALEEJI REGISTER: The user is writing in Gulf Arabic. Calibrate emotional warmth, phrasing rhythm, and vocabulary for natural Khaleeji translation. If the user uses markers (وايد, زين, شلونك), match their warmth level. Avoid clinical or formal MSA phrasing.
